title: Memory table error after enabling runners
symptom: After enabling N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED and OFFLOAD_MANUAL_EXECUTIONS_TO_WORKERS, n8n encounters issues related to the memory table.
root_cause: Enabling the runners may lead to inconsistencies or errors in the memory table, which can prevent n8n from functioning correctly. This can happen if the memory table is corrupted or not properly initialized.
fix_steps: Access the database where the memory table is stored
Restart n8n to allow it to create a new memory table
agent_instruction: Delete the memory table and restart n8n to recreate it.
safety_notes: Ensure you have backups of any important data before deleting the memory table.
